step_0.prompt: Let's sort this out 🔍 Have you already completed the payment at the central unit?

pay_help.prompt:
No problem 👍

👉 Go to the central unit
👉 Insert coins or use your card
👉 Select your machine number
👉 Press the program button
👉 Close the door

pay_retry.prompt: Were you able to complete the payment?

display_check.prompt:
What does the display show?

1️⃣ SEL
2️⃣ Price (€)
3️⃣ PUSH / Pr
4️⃣ DOOR
5️⃣ ALM
6️⃣ AL001
7️⃣ END
8️⃣ An EXTRA button stays fixed

case_sel.prompt:
SEL means the machine is ready 👍

👉 Select your machine number and press a program button

case_price.prompt:
The display shows the remaining amount 💶

👉 Insert coins or use your card until the display changes to PUSH

case_push.prompt:
Payment complete ✅

👉 Press a program button to start the wash

case_extra_button.prompt:
Do you want that EXTRA option, or was it selected by mistake?

Reply YES if you want the EXTRA, NO if you do not.

case_extra_remove.prompt:
An EXTRA option may still be selected by mistake ⚠️

👉 Press the EXTRA button that stays fixed so it turns off
👉 Then continue the normal wash steps

case_extra_pay_more.prompt:
That EXTRA option needs additional payment 💶

👉 Add the missing money for the EXTRA
👉 Then continue with the normal wash steps

case_door.prompt:
The door is not properly closed 🚪

👉 Open it and close it firmly until you hear a click

case_alm.prompt:
Which alarm do you see?

1️⃣ ALM/A
2️⃣ ALM/E
3️⃣ ALM/DOOR
4️⃣ ALM/VAr
5️⃣ Another ALM code

case_alm_a.prompt:
ALM/A = water inlet issue ⚠️

👉 Press STOP once
👉 Try the wash again

case_alm_e.prompt:
ALM/E = drain issue ⚠️

👉 Press STOP once
👉 Wait a few minutes in case the machine is still draining
👉 Try again

case_alm_door.prompt:
ALM/DOOR = door safety lock issue ⚠️

👉 Press STOP once
👉 Open and close the door firmly
👉 Try again

case_alm_var.prompt:
ALM/VAr usually needs technical review ⚠️

I'm notifying the operator to review the washer.

case_alm_unknown.prompt:
This alarm code needs manual review ⚠️

I'm notifying the operator to help you.

case_al001.prompt:
AL001 = sequence error ❗

👉 Restart the full sequence:
1️⃣ Pay
2️⃣ Select machine
3️⃣ Press program
4️⃣ Close door

case_end.prompt:
Do you see only END, or does it alternate with bAL?

1️⃣ Only END
2️⃣ END + bAL

case_end_only.prompt: END means the wash cycle has finished ✅ If you have another issue, please describe it.

case_end_bal.prompt:
END + bAL means the load was unbalanced ⚖️

👉 Split the clothes and run another cycle
👉 The operator can review possible compensation if needed

escalate_pay.prompt: I'm notifying the operator to help with the payment issue 🙌

escalate.prompt: I'm notifying the operator 🙌 They will assist you shortly.

ok.prompt: Perfect! The washing machine has started correctly ✅

step_0.prompt: Did you press STOP before the wash had actually started?

before_start.prompt: If the wash had not started yet, select the program again and start the washer ✅

first_time_check.prompt: Is this the first time this has happened?

first_time_escalate.prompt: STOP cancels the wash cycle. I'm notifying the operator to review a possible first-time reactivation 🙌

repay_required.prompt: STOP cancels the wash cycle. To restart, the washer usually needs a new payment. Compensation is not automatic.

step_0.prompt:
What happened after the wash?

1️⃣ Clothes very wet
2️⃣ Door locked
3️⃣ Clothes damaged
4️⃣ No foam
5️⃣ Other issue

wet.prompt: Did the display alternate between END and bAL?

wet_balanced_issue.prompt:
END + bAL means the load was unbalanced ⚖️

👉 Split the clothes into two loads
👉 Run another cycle
👉 The operator can review possible compensation if needed

wet_overload_issue.prompt:
The washer may have been overloaded ⚖️

👉 Split the clothes into two loads
👉 Run another cycle
👉 The operator can review possible compensation if needed

door.prompt:
The door may take 2–3 minutes to unlock ⏱️

👉 Please wait a moment and try again

damage.prompt: I'm notifying the operator 🙌 They will review the case. Compensation is not automatic.

foam.prompt: Low foam is normal ✅ Industrial detergent produces less visible foam but washes effectively.

escalate.prompt: I'm notifying the operator 🙌 They will assist you shortly.
